app.title: Subcast

library.title: Library
library.subtitle: Media files and subtitles cached locally. Click to open in the player, or remove here.
library.deleteOneDesc: {name} and its cached subtitles will be removed. This cannot be undone.
library.clearAllDesc: This will delete every cached media file and subtitle. This action cannot be undone.
library.renameDesc: Leave blank to restore the original filename.

empty.title: Library is empty
empty.description: Drag a media file into the home page and it will appear here.

index.drop: Drop one or more video/audio files (single files can include .srt/.vtt/.ass), or
index.cancelTaskDesc: The current task for "{name}" will stop. Completed data will be kept where possible.
index.chunkTooltip: {total} speech chunks (≤30 s each, music/silence pre-filtered by VAD)
index.noVideo: No video or audio file in the drop

urlImport.placeholder: Video link (ScreenPal / Bilibili / YouTube / direct media)
urlImport.hint: Resolved and downloaded by yt-dlp (1500+ sites)

library.title: Recent files
library.renameDesc: Leave empty to restore the original filename.

companion.title: Companion subtitles detected
companion.body: Found a subtitle file alongside the media:

player.indexSubtitle: For search, navigation, and review · not a substitute for on-screen captions

retranscribe.title: Re-transcribe this file?
retranscribe.desc: Clears the original subtitles, {n} translation(s), and AI summary, then re-runs Whisper with the current model. This cannot be undone.

player.suspectTitle: Whisper marked these chunks as low confidence
player.suspectCueTitle: Transcription quality may be off (retried 2 times)

errors.TASK_NOT_FOUND: This task has expired. Please retry.
errors.MODEL_NOT_CONFIGURED: No AI model is configured or available. Open Settings → Models to install one.
errors.WHISPER_NOT_CONFIGURED: Whisper transcription is not ready. Open Settings → Models to download a voice model.
errors.ORIGINAL_NOT_READY: Original transcript isn't ready yet. Run transcription first.
errors.BATCH_RETRY_EXHAUSTED: Translation retried several times and still failed. Try again or switch models.
errors.PARSE_FAILED: The AI output couldn't be parsed. Please try again.

player.cancelTranslationDesc: Cues translated so far will be kept. You can resume by switching to this language again later.

diarize.renameDialogDesc: Leave blank to restore the default name.
diarize.unknownWarning: {percent} ({duration}) couldn't be confidently assigned to a speaker.
diarize.runHint: Identify speakers in this video (runs locally, ~5-7 min/h)
diarize.singleSpeakerHint: Diarization found one speaker — no grouping needed.
diarize.doneHint: Diarization complete. Use the toggle in the subtitle panel to switch list / grouped view.

insights.emptyHint: Generate summary and chapters from the transcript.
insights.clearDesc: The cached summary and chapters will be removed. You can regenerate later. This cannot be undone.
insights.langMismatch: This AI summary was generated in {lang}.
insights.outdatedHint: Insights were generated with outdated settings (model or transcript changed).

errors.VIDEO_TOO_LONG: Media is too long for AI insights with the current model.
errors.PARSE_FAILED: The AI output couldn't be parsed. Please try again.
errors.MODEL_NOT_CONFIGURED: No AI model is configured or available. Open Settings → Models to install one.
errors.fallback: Failed to generate insights. Please try again.

create.title: Batch process {count} files
create.desc: Choose a preset to start. Results are saved to the library.
create.noTranslate: This preset does not include translation.
create.uploadOnStart: {count} files will be imported and queued after you start.
create.readyToCreate: {count} files will be queued for batch processing.
create.partialReady: {ready} files already have reusable results. {queued} files will be queued.
create.libraryReused: {library} files are already in the library. {queued} files will be queued.
create.libraryAndPartialReady: {library} files are already in the library. {ready} files already have the requested results. {queued} files will be queued.
create.allReady: All selected results already exist for {count} files. No batch is needed.

presetDescriptions.transcribe_translate_insights: Runs transcription, translation, and AI summary.
presetDescriptions.full: Runs transcription, translation, AI summary, and speaker recognition.

errors.allUploadsFailed: All file uploads failed. Please try again.
errors.partialStageFailed: {count} files failed preflight. The remaining files can still be queued.
errors.partialUploadFailed: {count} uploads failed. A batch was created for the remaining files.

info.reused: {reused} files were already in the library, so existing results will be reused. {queued} files were queued for batch processing.
info.allReady: All selected results already exist for {count} files. No batch was created.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Per-user preferences and on-disk cache management.

models.notInstalledWarn: {name} is not fully installed — transcription will fail. Use "Download more" or pick an installed model from the list below.
models.notConfigured: Not configured — set up an AI model via the setup wizard.
models.empty: No models installed — click Download more above
models.emptyLlm: No AI model installed — click Download more above
models.deleteDesc: {name} ({size}) will be removed from this machine. You'll need to re-download it next time.

settings.whisperHint: Bigger = more accurate but slower. Changes apply to new transcribe tasks.
settings.llmHint: Local Qwen 2.5 quantization served by an in-process llama-server. Recommended: {model}.
settings.silenceHint: Inter-cue gaps ≥ this duration get a 「── no audio ──」divider in the cue list.

chunkingStrategy.title: Audio chunking
chunkingStrategy.hint: How Subcast splits audio before feeding it to the transcriber.
chunkingStrategy.vadHint: Uses Silero VAD to skip music / silence regions. Fewer hallucinations, faster on long videos.
chunkingStrategy.fixedHint: Slices every 30 s regardless of content. Use only if auto-detect fails on your hardware.

settings.cueFontSizeHint: Affects only the subtitle list panel; in-player subtitle styling is configured separately.
settings.debugDescription: Keep raw paths and filenames in JSONL logs.
settings.debugMode: Debug mode (keep raw paths/filenames in JSONL logs)

cache.title: Cache
cache.noVideosDesc: Drag a media file into the home page and it will appear here.
cache.deleteOneDesc: {name} and its cached subtitles will be removed. This cannot be undone.
cache.clearAllDesc: This will delete every cached media file and subtitle. This action cannot be undone.

diagnostic.title: Diagnostic
diagnostic.body: ZIP with sanitized JSONL logs (last 7d), settings, hardware info, installed models. No media content or cue text.

logViewer.title: Log viewer
logViewer.body: Recent structured events. Strings in path / name fields are hashed unless Debug mode is on.
logViewer.noFiles: No log files yet — events appear here after the first transcription.
logViewer.truncatedNote: Older lines exist. Increase the tail count or export the full ZIP.
logViewer.writerUnhealthy: Log writer is failing — recent events may not be persisted to disk.

help.title: Help
help.subtitle: Usage help, version information, and release notes.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.body: Important changes in recent versions. The repository remains the source of truth for the full commit history.

v046.cancel: The cancel button now actually cancels: it signals the server to SIGTERM the running yt-dlp (or drop a queued import) instead of only hiding the progress bar while the download kept running in the background.
v046.concurrency: Fixed a race where pasting two import links in quick succession could spawn two yt-dlp processes at once; the single-flight queue now reserves its execution slot synchronously before the first await.
v046.realExt: Imported audio is no longer mis-stored as .mp4: the real downloaded extension (.m4a / .webm / .mp3 …) is used, so /api/video serves the correct Content-Type and the player works.
v046.ipv4: Downloads that failed with SSL UNEXPECTED_EOF_WHILE_READING on IPv6-hosting CDNs now pin IPv4 (--force-ipv4) and back off between retries (--retry-sleep exponential) instead of hammering the server 10× and getting rate-limited.

v045.urlImport: New "Import link" in the home drop zone: paste a web URL from ScreenPal / Bilibili / YouTube and 1500+ other sites, the bundled yt-dlp downloads it with a live percentage, then jumps to the player to start transcribing.
v045.dedup: Re-importing the same link short-circuits to the already-downloaded video with zero network I/O and an instant jump; different-source-same-content is deduped by SHA-256, so disk isn't double-spent.
v045.network: yt-dlp now uses a larger socket timeout and more retries, and automatically forwards the system proxy (Electron child processes don't inherit it by default), reducing timeouts on international sites.
v045.schemaHeal: Fixed URL import 500'ing on first use: the DB's version number had been bumped past this branch's column-adding migration by another branch. Added self-healing so the required columns exist regardless of the version number.

v041.llamaStatic: Fixed macOS packaged translation / AI Insights being completely broken: the prebuilt llama-server was dynamically linked but shipped without dylibs. CI now compiles a static build from source (-DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF).
v041.foreignKey: Fixed FOREIGN KEY constraint failed on clearing cache / deleting a single video / retrying transcription: added all dependent-table deletions and moved PRAGMA foreign_keys outside the transaction.
v041.windowsStartup: Fixed Windows packaged app crashing at startup (file:///_entry.js): import.meta.url returns an invalid path for ESM modules inside asar; switched to app.getAppPath().
v041.ciPipeline: Fixed the GitHub Actions release pipeline: whisper-cli / llama-server artifact completeness, Windows VS2026 compatibility, proxy bypass, fetch timeout, dylib bundling, and 10+ other issues.

v040.multiLocale: UI now ships in Traditional Chinese, Japanese, and Spanish in addition to Simplified Chinese and English. The 2-state language toggle is upgraded to a dropdown picker with script-native short labels.
v040.windowPause: Pause media automatically when the desktop window hides or minimizes, so audio stops with the window.
v040.playerToolbar: Player toolbar now holds actions only; cache / transcribing / translating status moved to a meta row under the video name. The right panel is renamed from "Subtitles" to "Index" to clarify its role.
v040.polish: Smoother waveform progress on short videos; batch staging and cache-clear flows are more reliable.

v039.batch: Added batch processing: select multiple audio/video files, configure once, and let Subcast queue the work.
v039.workflow: Added batch presets that combine transcription, translation, AI summary, and speaker recognition.
v039.queue: Added batch progress cards in the task queue with overall progress, failure counts, and retry support.

v037.diarize: Added speaker diarization after transcription, with speaker labels available in the subtitle view.
v037.speakerUi: Added speaker labels, grouped subtitle view, and speaker renaming for interviews, podcasts, and meetings.
v037.packaging: Fixed native dependency loading for speaker recognition in packaged macOS builds.

v035.downloads: Improved model download reliability to reduce first-run failures caused by unstable networks.
v035.mirrors: Added automatic mirror probing and selection between Hugging Face and mirror hosts.
v035.resume: Improved resume and cancellation recovery so large model downloads do not restart from scratch.

v030.llama: Switched the AI engine from Ollama to bundled llama.cpp/llama-server to reduce external runtime dependencies.
v030.localAi: Moved translation and AI summaries onto Subcast-managed local LLM models with a unified setup flow.
v030.settings: Added model management in Settings for viewing, switching, downloading, and deleting local models.

v020.macApp: Added the first macOS desktop app experience.
v020.packaging: Bundled transcription sidecars and runtime resources to reduce manual local-server setup.
v020.diagnostics: Added diagnostic export, tray integration, and basic desktop menus for testing and issue reports.

v010.web: Initial release as a locally-run web app.
v010.transcribe: Added local media import and Whisper-based transcription.
v010.translate: Added translation subtitles from transcription output to validate the core workflow.

setupWizard.actionIgnore: Ignore and download a fresh copy
setupWizard.mirrorAutoNote: Auto-detect: probe huggingface.co and hf-mirror.com in parallel for 4 s, then download from whichever delivers faster. If both fail, falls back to hf-mirror.com automatically.
setupWizard.pollFailed: Install status stopped updating. Check your connection and try again.
setupWizard.installCanceled: Download canceled. Pick a model and hit Download again to resume.
setupWizard.checkingEvery5s: Checking every 5 seconds — keep this window open.

llm.lowMemoryWarning: Your machine has under 8 GB RAM — running an AI model may slow the system. You can skip this step and configure AI later in Settings.

about.subtitle: Free · Offline · LLM — audio/video transcription & translation

help.title: Help
help.introBody: Quick reference for first-time setup quirks and where to look when something misbehaves. The full docs live in the repository README.

diagnostics.title: Export diagnostics
diagnostics.body: Help → Export Diagnostics… (also in the tray menu) zips the last 7 days of structured logs plus a system.json snapshot — no media content, transcript text, or filenames are included. Attach the zip when filing an issue.

updates.title: Updates
updates.windowsBody: Windows auto-downloads differential updates in the background and applies them on next launch.
updates.macBody: macOS is manual: Help → Check for Updates… opens the release page in your browser; download and drag the new app into Applications.

faq.title: Common issues
faq.mirrorBody: Subcast races huggingface.co against hf-mirror.com for 4 s and downloads from the faster side; if both fail it falls back to hf-mirror.com automatically — usually no action needed. If it's still slow, tick 'Force hf-mirror.com' in Step 1 to skip the probe. Partially-downloaded bytes resume; no restart needed.
faq.macGatekeeperBody: System Settings → Privacy & Security → scroll to the bottom for the explicit 'Open Anyway' button.
faq.zombieBody: We mark it failed instead of silently re-running inference. Hit Retry on the home page when ready.
